title: Croatian Pork Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful dish from Croatian cuisine, made with tender pork and a rich tagine sauce.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the pork and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the pork from the pot and set aside.
Add the onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic, cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and pepper to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the red wine to the pot and bring to a boil.
Return the pork to the pot and cover with a lid.
Transfer the pot to the oven and cook for 2 hours, or until the pork is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Serve with a side of crusty bread or over rice.
